hub_subtitle: Conversação para Feiras Internacionais de Turismo & Hotelaria

lesson.menu_title: Reactivation Diagnostic -- Who Are You in English?
lesson.menu_desc: Reactivating your English at an international tourism fair -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Reactivation Diagnostic
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Andrea Aggio | Aula 1 -- Reactivation Diagnostic

listenings.text: Hi Andrea, this is Thomas from Munich. We met at the tourism fair in Berlin last week. It was really great to talk to you at our stand. I have spoken with my team, and we would love to work with Escape Turismo. We have just opened two new venues on the coast, and I think they would be perfect for your European itineraries. Please reach out whenever you have a moment, and we can talk about bookings and rates for next season. I am looking forward to hearing from you. Take care.

Good morning, and welcome to the International Travel and Tourism Fair. We are delighted to have hospitality professionals from more than sixty countries with us today. The networking lounge is now open on the second floor, where you can meet hoteliers, suppliers, and destination partners from around the world. Our keynote on sustainable tourism begins at eleven in the main hall. If you are looking for a specific exhibitor, please reach out to the information desk near the main entrance. We hope you have a productive day and make many valuable connections.
